title: ACMD review of the evidence on the use and harms of etomidate
body: "The Advisory Council on the Misuse of Drugs (ACMD) undertook a self-commissioned review to evaluate the potential harms associated with etomidate and related compounds. The review determined these substances may pose a risk to public health in the UK and considered their suitability for control under the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971. "
